background: Recall that event A is cat ownership and event B is dog ownership. We have established Pr(B | A)= 0.4286, Pr(Ā)=1-Pr(A)=1-0.35=0.65, and Pr(B and Ā)=0.15.

task.query: By conditional probability, Pr(B | Ā)=Pr(B and Ā)/Pr(Ā)=0.15/0.65=0.2308.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

meta info.caption: Total probability rule (Pet ownership).
meta info.section: 5.5  MORE RULES AND PROPERTIES OF PROBABILITY
